ShortDescription.Value: Multiplies residential property rent by a configurable factor.

Publish.LongDescription:
Paulov's Rent Mod
A simple mod that multiplies residential rent in your city by a configurable multiplier.
Features: - Adjustable rent multiplier (1x to 10x, step 0.5) - Toggle mod on/off from the options menu - Works with existing save games
## How to use 1. Launch the game and go to Options > Paulov's Rent Mod 2. Adjust the Rent Multiplier slider 3. Rent values will be updated the next simulation tick
